tools.name: memory.search
tools.description: Search local scoped memory records and return compact references.

tools.name: memory.maintenance
tools.description: Report local memory store health, active records, pending temporal records, and expired records.

tools.name: memory.prune_expired
tools.description: Delete expired local memory records from the local memory store.

tools.name: memory.forget
tools.description: Delete a local memory record or imported knowledge document from the local memory store.

tools.name: knowledge.ingest
tools.description: Chunk pasted local knowledge into the local memory store for later retrieval.

tools.name: data.export
tools.description: Export local chat sessions and memory records as a portable JSON backup bundle.

tools.name: data.import
tools.description: Restore local chat sessions and memory records from a portable JSON backup bundle.

tools.name: context.compact
tools.description: Create a structured handoff summary when context approaches its budget.

tools.name: plugin.create
tools.description: Scaffold a local myMoE plugin directory with manifest and skill entry point.

tools.name: extension.audit
tools.description: Validate plugin references against configured tools, skills, MCP servers, cron jobs, and risk classes.

tools.name: extension.configure
tools.description: Guarded self-configuration for MCP server and cron job registry entries.

tools.name: profile.activate
tools.description: Guarded default runtime profile activation in the app config file.

tools.name: storage.inspect
tools.description: Inspect configured local runtime storage capacity for model cache and work directories.

tools.name: mcp.search_capabilities
tools.description: List configured MCP servers and their declared capability domains.

tools.name: mcp.list_tools
tools.description: Start an enabled MCP stdio server and list its exposed tools.

tools.name: mcp.call_tool
tools.description: Call an explicitly allowlisted tool on an enabled MCP stdio server.
